# comfyui_polyexponential_scheduler (Resource)

ComfyUI PolyexponentialScheduler node [sampling/custom_sampling/schedulers] Source: comfy_extras/nodes_custom_sampler.py:88 (v3_extras).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rho` (Number) Input: FLOAT. Default: 1. Allowed range: 0 to 100. Step: 0.01.
- `sigma_max` (Number) Input: FLOAT. Default: 14.614642. Allowed range: 0 to 5000. Step: 0.01.
- `sigma_min` (Number) Input: FLOAT. Default: 0.0291675. Allowed range: 0 to 5000. Step: 0.01.
- `steps` (Number) Input: INT. Default: 20. Allowed range: 1 to 10000.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance.
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type.
- `sigmas_output` (String) Output: SIGMAS (slot 0).
